name_en: 【Exclusive Photo M48865 Green Octagonal Chain/Mini】 This Capucines Mini handbag is crafted from bright Taurillon cowhide, with colorful enamel set into the delicate octagonal chain links, embodying the Art Deco design philosophy. 3D LV letters add a fresh touch. 21 x 14 x 8 cm (Length x Height x Width)
